items.title: Ajax maakt werk van Vélez-aanvaller Carrizo
items.summary: Ajax heeft zich bij Vélez Sarsfield gemeld voor aanvaller Maher Carrizo (19). De negentienjarige buitenspeler is nu topkandidaat om Raúl Moro op te volgen in Amsterdam.

items.title: VI Live: Feyenoord heeft wonder nodig, Utrecht toont karakter
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van donderdag 29 januari. Het is de dag van de beslissingen in de eerste fase van de Europa League. Mis hier niets van Real Betis - Feyenoord, Go Ahead Eagles - Sporting Braga en Celtic - FC Utrecht.

items.title: USWNT legend Dunn announces retirement at 33
items.summary: United States women's national team great Crystal Dunn on Thursday announced her retirement from soccer at age 33.

items.title: Sources: Benzema 'disrespected' by Al Ittihad offe...
items.summary: Karim Benzema has felt disrespected after the contract extension offered to him by Al Ittihad, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Prem teams set for big payday with CL dominance
items.summary: Top Premier League clubs are profiting even more this season from prize money in the UEFA Champions League.

items.title: Pep: City panicked over Mourinho's UCL strategy
items.summary: Pep Guardiola revealed Manchester City were panicking over their Champions League hopes as Benfica pushed for a late goal against Real Madrid.

items.title: Europa League: goals and action from all 18 games in league phase finale – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from final round of the stage, 8pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Table | Follow us on Bluesky | Email Luke “Villa feel like a proper club again,” says your roving reporter Martin Keown at Villa Park. Not sure what “proper” means there, but OK. “They can win the Premier League. Everyone’s saying they can’t.” Continue reading...

items.title: Allen has surgery on injured foot, but will be back for spring practice
items.summary: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen has revealed that he recently had surgery for a broken bone in his right foot, but expects to be fully healed for the start of spring practices.

items.title: Feyenoord gekraakt: 'Misschien mag je ook wel niet meer dan dit verwachten'
items.summary: Analytici vinden niet dat Feyenoord goed voor de dag komt in de Europa League-wedstrijd tegen Real Betis. Maar kun je wel meer verwachten van de Rotterdammers?

items.title: Sutton's predictions v boxer Francesca Hennessy
items.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on boxer Francesca Hennessy and AI with his predictions for this week's Premier League fixtures.

items.title: Ranked: Who are the top 50 players in the Premier ...
items.summary: The league is more bunched up and more competitive, which made selecting our list tougher than ever.

items.title: AJ's emotional tribute after friends deaths: 'The mission must go on'
items.summary: Anthony Joshua has paid an emotional tribute to his two friends who died in a car accident in Nigeria.

items.title: Transfers Ajax: 'Juventus gaat aan de haal met talent'
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij Ajax op de voet, zeker nu de winterse transferwindow in aantocht is. De doelwitten van de Amsterdammers, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: Burgzorg kan helpen Bristol te verlossen van bijzondere status
items.summary: Delano Burgzorg laat Middlesbrough tijdelijk achter zich. De 27-jarige vleugelaanvaller wordt de rest van het seizoen verhuurd aan Bristol City, dat net als Boro in de race is voor promotie naar de Premier League.

items.title: Crystal Palace stall on £50m Strand Larsen deal but close on Guessand loan
items.summary: Palace will not let Mateta go without replacement James Ward-Prowse seals loan move to Burnley Jørgen Strand Larsen’s £50m move from Wolves to south London is in serious doubt after Crystal Palace stalled on a deal on Thursday afternoon. Palace had verbally agreed in principle to sign the Norway striker for £45m, plus £5m in add-ons. Wolves were awaiting a formal written offer but it never arrived despite positive talks. Continue reading...

items.title: Palace move for £50m Strand Larsen in doubt
items.summary: Crystal Palace's £50m move for Wolves striker Jorgen Strand Larsen is in the balance after the Eagles suggest they could walk away from the deal.

items.title: How English clubs got smart to dominate this season's Champions League
items.summary: Premier League clubs always had the money, but now they also have the know-how they have dominated this season's Champions League.

items.title: Hamilton: Ferrari doing better than last year in F1 testing
items.summary: Lewis Hamilton said Ferrari have made a better start to Formula 1 pre-season testing than they did last year as he praised the team for amassing an "amazing" amount of mileage in Barcelona.

items.title: Moeen: McCullum should 'definitely' keep England job
items.summary: Moeen Ali says Brendon McCullum is "definitely the right person" to lead England's Test team forward but insists "tweaks" are needed following their disappointing Ashes tour.

items.title: Arsenal in talks to sign Barcelona's Batlle in summer
items.summary: Arsenal have held advanced discussions with Barcelona full-back Ona Batlle in the hope of reaching a pre-contract agreement to sign her in the summer.
